intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (4°C, 10°C), thermocycling. (volumes 10µL-200µL, ~88 min total)
intent: For this IDT xGEN EZ protocol, you'll be working with the magnetic sample plate in slot 1, reservoirs and deep well plate in slot 2, and reagent plate in slot 3, using the magnetic module, temperature module, and thermocycler throughout. Start by setting both the temperature module and thermocycler to 4°C, then perform the fragmentation and end repair (FRERAT) steps with multiple mixing cycles using FRERATMixRep, followed by sealing and running the FRERAT program for 60 minutes. Next, proceed with ligation using LIGMixRep mixing cycles and run the LIG program for 15 minutes at the specified temperature, then 20 minutes more. The protocol involves extensive magnetic bead separations with gradual height adjustments from 8.5mm down to 5mm with 1-minute incubations at each height, multiple 20µL and 10µL transfers with 6-second waits, RSB washes with RSBMixRep cycles, PCR setup with PrimerMixRep and PCRMixRep mixing, running PCR for the specified PCRCYCLES, and finally two rounds of AMPure bead cleanup with AMPureMixRep mixing cycles and the same magnetic separation gradient.
